headline: Enbridge's Stable Business Model Powers Growth & Distribution Outlook
summary: ENB's contract-backed model drives steady cash flow, enabling growth investments and plans to return $40-$45B to shareholders over five years.

headline: Ahead of Kinder Morgan (KMI) Q1 Earnings: Get Ready With Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
summary: Get a deeper insight into the potential performance of Kinder Morgan (KMI) for the quarter ended March 2026 by going beyond Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates and examining the estimates for some of its key metrics.

headline: Kinder Morgan LNG Approval Raises New Questions For Valuation And Cash Flows
summary: Kinder Morgan (NYSE:KMI) received approval from the U.S. Department of Energy to expand LNG exports from its Elba Island terminal. The authorization covers higher export volumes of domestically produced LNG to countries that have free trade agreements with the United States and those that do not. This decision is a fresh regulatory milestone for KMI’s LNG footprint and adds a new piece of information to the company’s recent news flow. Kinder Morgan is one of the largest energy...
